basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Nursing Assistant, Female Attendant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Nursing Assistant, Female Attendant and More
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has released the ECHS Recruitment 2026 notification for 9 contractual Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff posts including Officer-in-Charge (Only for ESM), Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, Dental Hygienist/Assistant, Ambulance Driver and Female Attendant under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate + 05 Yrs experience, MBBS+05 Yrs Experience, BDS+03 Yrs Experience, D Pharma + Registered Pharmacist+ 03 Yrs Experience, GNM + 05 Yrs Experience, Diploma Holder in Dental + 05 Yrs Experience, 8th pass + 05 yrs experience, Literate + Minimum 5 years experience
qualification.details: Officer -in-Charge (Only for ESM): Graduate + 05 Yrs experience Medical Officer: MBBS + 05 Yrs Experience Dental Officer: BDS + 03 Yrs Experience Pharmacist: D Pharma + Registered Pharmacist + 03 Yrs Experience Nursing Assistant: GNM + 05 Yrs Experience Dental Hygienist/ Assistant: Diploma Holder in Dental + 05 Yrs Experience Ambulance Driver: 8th pass + 05 yrs experience Female Attendant: Literate + Minimum 5 years experience

salary_details.details: Officer -in-Charge (Only for ESM): 95,000/- Medical OlIcer: 95,000/- Dental Officer: 95,000/- Pharmacist: 36.500/- Nursing Assistant: 36,500/ Dental Hygienist/ Assistant: 36,500/- Ambulance Driver: 25,600/- Female Attendant: 21,800/-

selection_process: Shortlisting Interview 10 day on job training (OJT)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
